description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a dark charcoal gray fabric. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion for the main section, with an additional cushion forming the chaise. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive silhouette. The legs are short and blocky, barely visible beneath the base, giving the sofa a grounded and sturdy appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a subtle woven texture, and the overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in dark charcoal gray fabric with a left-facing chaise, boxy armrests, and minimalist design. Features three back cushions and a continuous seat cushion with subtle woven texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shaped layout, three back cushions, left-facing chaise, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the full length of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform, loose back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion for the main section, with an additional cushion for the chaise; all cushions are rectangular and un-tufted.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, straight armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, fully padded with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, recessed under the base for a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
